title: EoE Flashing Image Montage
wikitext:
[]: EoE: Flashing Image Montage             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Thu Sep 02, 2021 3:18 pm Has anyone ever done a breakdown of the images/voices that barrage the audience at the end of the Komm, Süsser Tod sequence, (~1:11:23-1:12:26)? For the voices of the women rejecting Shinji, the only one I recognize (I think) is Miyamura as Asuka at the end, saying she'd rather die. Who are the others? As for the images, some of them are familiar footage from the series, but it also looks like a lot of live action, photos, some pencil/ink drawings. Have any of the sources been identified?

[]: Re: EoE: Flashing Image Montage             Quote Post by Amalgam429 » Wed Sep 29, 2021 11:35 am While not immediately relevant, this page could be a good place to start investigating montage in Evangelion. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_An ... Evangelion There might be offshoots you can explore from this page too. Never be afraid to do your own analysis too!

[]: Re: EoE: Flashing Image Montage             Quote Post by SuperSandwichGoku » Thu Oct 14, 2021 3:50 pm As for the voices, the only resource I can point to is this translation of EoE I found linked on EvaGeeks here . It has basic scene descriptions and lists dialogue, not too much but might help. I've heard the Fan Geeks Commentary will hopefully get to EoE eventually so you could also keep an eye on that.

[]: EoE: Flashing Image Montage             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Thu Sep 02, 2021 3:18 pm Has anyone ever done a breakdown of the images/voices that barrage the audience at the end of the Komm, Süsser Tod sequence, (~1:11:23-1:12:26)? For the voices of the women rejecting Shinji, the only one I recognize (I think) is Miyamura as Asuka at the end, saying she'd rather die. Who are the others? As for the images, some of them are familiar footage from the series, but it also looks like a lot of live action, photos, some pencil/ink drawings. Have any of the sources been identified?
